classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

metadata.author: The Canons of the Council in Trullo; Often Called The Quinisext Council

title: Canon LXX.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Women are not permitted to speak at the time of the Divine Liturgy; but, according to the word of Paul the Apostle, “let them be silent.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: For it is not permitted to them to speak, but to be in subjection, as the law also saith.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: But if they wish to learn anything let them ask their own husbands at home.”

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: Women are not permitted to speak in church.

verses.book: The Canons of the Council in Trullo.
verses.text: “Let your women keep silence in the churches; for it is not permitted unto them to speak,” is the passage referred to.
